author: doll-agent
content: Add FftPlanND to ferray-fft/src/plan.rs: stores a fixed shape + canonical axes list, pre-warms the per-axis f64 plan cache (one forward + one inverse Arc per axis), validates input shape on execute, and dispatches through fftn/ifftn so it picks up the warm cache. Pre-warming hits the rustfft planner Mutex once at FftPlanND::new instead of on every fftn() call. Accessors (forward_axis_plan / inverse_axis_plan / num_axis_plans) expose the cached plans for callers that want to drive rustfft directly. Tests cover default-axes parity with fftn, round-trip, explicit axes subset, shape mismatch, zero-dim rejection, and Arc-equality with the global cache.
